name: append
doc: Appends each item in the items array to the end of the value array.

name: contains
doc: Determines whether the value string contains the specified substring.

name: del
doc: Removes the field specified by the static path from the target. Use remove for dynamic path deletion.

name: downcase
doc: Downcases the value string using Unicode lowercase rules.

name: exists
doc: Checks whether the path exists for the target, distinguishing missing paths from null values.

name: get
doc: Dynamically gets the value of a given path from an object or array.

name: includes
doc: Determines whether the value array includes the specified item.

name: length
doc: Returns the byte length of a string, the number of array elements, or the number of top-level object keys.

name: log
doc: Logs the value to stdout at the specified level.

name: now
doc: Returns the current timestamp in the UTC timezone with nanosecond precision.

name: parse_json
doc: Parses the provided value as JSON and returns a structured JSON value.

name: pop
doc: Removes the last item from the value array.

name: push
doc: Adds the item to the end of the value array.

name: replace
detail: replace(value: string, pattern: string | regex, with: string)
doc: Replaces all matching instances of pattern in value.

name: set
detail: set(value: object | array, path: array, data: any)
doc: Dynamically inserts data into the path of a given object or array.

name: split
detail: split(value: string, pattern: string | regex, [limit: integer])
doc: Splits the value string using pattern.

name: strip_whitespace
doc: Strips Unicode whitespace from the start and end of value.

name: to_int
doc: Coerces the value into an integer.

name: to_string
doc: Coerces the value into a string.

name: upcase
doc: Upcases value using Unicode uppercase rules.
